---
title: "Archívum"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  contents:
    - four_factors_1.qmd
    - scoring_efficiency.qmd
    - pace_efficiency.qmd
    - advanced_metrics.qmd
    - wdre_metodologia.qmd
    - futball/striker_clustering.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [date, title, description]
---
